message: Community reports of a recruitment office promising overseas jobs, collecting fees and passports, then going silent. Verify any agency before paying.
Several small workshops in the old market are reported to employ children during school hours. Witnesses can report anonymously.
Alert about individuals being coerced in the nightlife district. If someone cannot leave freely or hand over their own ID, that is a warning sign.
Workers at riverside kilns reportedly held against advances they cannot repay. Debt used to prevent leaving is a form of bonded labour.
A construction staffing office is signing people onto sites and withholding wages and documents. Keep copies of any contract you sign.
Support services report a rise in girls withdrawn from school ahead of forced marriages. Confidential help is available before anything is arranged.
